text: The space is dimly lit, casting an air of mystery and mild discomfort around me. The closed glass doors and the empty, almost industrial hallway feel isolating, yet strangely contemplative. I notice the 'R+D' sign and snippets about research and innovation—these concepts stir thoughts about the nature of progress and its silent, sometimes cold, manifestations in our environments. I feel a sense of detachment, but also curiosity, pondering the hidden narratives behind these institutional walls.
